title: Kit for delivery of an active compound into the skin
abstract: The present invention relates to a kit for enabling delivery of an active compound to the skin for penetration into the skin, a delivery device for delivering an active compound, and a method of delivery of an active compound. In one aspect there is an active compound delivery kit for enabling delivery of an active compound into the skin of a subject, the kit comprising:- an arrangement for providing a pathway into a biological barrier of a subject in an application zone;- an active compound provided in dry form; -a delivery device for delivery of dissolved active compound to the application zone. Provision of a pathway into the biological barrier, preferably skin, is provided and the active compound applied in optimum form within a short time frame after forming the pathway ensuring treatment of the desired skin cells is optimised.
claims: Claims Claims 1. An active compound delivery kit for enabling delivery of an active compound into the skin of a subject, the kit comprising: - an arrangement for providing a pathway into a biological barrier of a subject in an application zone; an active compound provided in dry form; a delivery device for delivery of dissolved active compound to the application zone. 2. A kit according to claim 1 wherein the active compound comprises a precursor to nicotinamide adenine dinucleotide (NAD+). 3. A kit according to any preceding claim wherein the active compound comprises nicotinamide and/or a derivative of nicotinamide. 4. A kit according to any preceding claim wherein the active compound comprises one or more of nicotinamide riboside ( R) and nicotinamide mononucleotide (NMN). 5. A kit according to any preceding claim wherein the active compound comprises or further comprises one or more of ascorbic acid (vitamin C), peptides, growth factors, anti- glycation actives, vitamins, retinoids, anti-oxidants, brightening and/or whitening agents, sirtuin activating compounds, polyphenols, and/or polyamines. 6. A kit according to any preceding claim wherein the active compound is in powdered form. 7. A kit according to any preceding claim wherein the delivery device comprises a liquid absorbent carrier of the dry active compound. 8. A kit according to any preceding claim wherein the delivery device comprises a patch. 9. A kit according to any of claims 7-8 wherein the delivery device comprises a structure having a plurality of interstices therein for receipt of the dry active compound. 10. A kit according to any preceding claim wherein the delivery device comprises a first portion and a second portion and wherein the active compound is provided between the first and the second portion. 11. A kit according to claim 10 wherein the first and second portions are stacked. 12. A kit according to any preceding claim further comprising a liquid dispensing arrangement for dispensing a liquid to the active compound in dry form for hydrating and/or dissolving the active compound to provide dissolved active compound. 13. A kit according to any preceding claim further comprising a cleaning arrangement for cleaning the arrangement for providing a pathway into the biological barrier. 14. A kit according to any preceding claim further comprising a sealed housing for housing the arrangement for providing a pathway into the biological barrier and the delivery device. 15. A kit according to any preceding claim wherein the active compound comprises one or more active compounds, and may comprise a mixture of active compounds. 16. A kit according to claim 15 wherein the active compound comprises a plurality of active compound constituents, and each active compound constituent is located in a separate zone on the substrate. 17. A kit according to any preceding claim wherein the apparatus for providing a pathway into the biological barrier is arranged to damage or ablate the outermost layer of the biological barrier. 18. A kit according to any preceding claim wherein the delivery device and apparatus for providing a pathway into the biological barrier are physically separate. 19. A kit according to any preceding claim wherein the apparatus for providing a pathway into the biological barrier comprises a device for administering a plurality of holes into the biological barrier. 20. A kit according to claim 19 wherein the device comprises a microneedle device having a plurality of microneedles extending from a microneedle carrying substrate. 21. A kit according to claim 20 wherein the microneedle device comprises a patch. 22. A kit according to any of claims 20-21 wherein the microneedle carrying substrate is a flexible substrate having a first side and a second opposing side, each microneedle comprising a head and a projection for penetrating the biological barrier extending from the head, wherein the projection at least partially extends through the flexible substrate towards the first side. 23. A kit according to claim 22 wherein the microneedle patch is deformable to conform to the geometry of a user's finger. 24. A kit according to claim 23 wherein the microneedle patch is pre-formed to conform to the geometry of a finger. 25. A kit according to any of claims 20-24 wherein the maximum longitudinal length of each of the microneedles projecting from the microneedle carrying substrate is less than 2mm, preferably less than 0.5mm, and even more preferably less than 0.3mm. 26. A kit according to any preceding claim wherein the kit comprises a plurality of delivery devices comprising a second delivery device, wherein each subset carries a different active compound. 27. A kit according to any preceding claim further comprising a cover for application to the application zone after application of the active compound to the application zone. 28. A delivery device for delivering an active compound to a biological barrier arranged to carry an active compound in dried form. 29. A delivery device according to claim 28 comprising a liquid absorbent material. 30. A delivery device according to any of claims 28-29 formed of a structure having a plurality of interstices therein for receipt of the dry active compound. 31. A delivery device according to any of claims 28-30 arranged to be drawn over a biological barrier. 32. A delivery device according to any of claims 28-31 comprising a first portion and a second portion, and wherein the active compound is provided between the first and second portions. 33. A delivery device according to claim 32 wherein the first and second portions define at least one pocket therebetween for receipt of the active compound. 34. A delivery device according to any of claims 28-33 wherein the active compound comprises a precursor to nicotinamide adenine dinucleotide (NAD+). 35. A delivery device according to any of claims 28-34 wherein the active compound comprises nicotinamide and/or a derivative of nicotinamide. 36. A delivery device according to any of claims 28-35 wherein the active compound comprises one or more of nicotinamide riboside (NR) and nicotinamide mononucleotide (NMN). 37. A delivery device according to any of claims 28-36 wherein the delivery device comprise a patch. 38. A delivery device according to claim 37 wherein the patch comprises an adhesive for adhering to a biological barrier. 39. A method of delivering an active compound into a biological barrier of a subject comprising: forming a pathway into the biological barrier in an application zone; - dissolving an active compound provided in dried form; applying the dissolved active compound to the application zone. 40. A method according to claim 39 comprising a cosmetic method for improving the appearance of the biological barrier, wherein the biological barrier comprises skin. 41. A method according to any of claims 39-40 wherein the step of forming a pathway into the biological barrier comprises applying an apparatus for providing a pathway into the biological barrier to the application zone. 42. A method according to claim 41 wherein the apparatus for providing a pathway into the biological barrier comprises a microneedle device having a plurality of microneedles extending from a microneedle carrying substrate, such that the plurality of microneedles project into the biological barrier in the application zone. 43. A method according to any of claims 39-42 comprising applying the active compound to the skin after hydration of the active compound. 44. A method according to any of claims 39-43 wherein the active compound is carried by a delivery device. 45. A method according to claim 44 wherein the active compound is dissolved on the delivery device. 46. A method according to any of claims 44-45 wherein application of the dissolved active compound to the skin is performed by wiping the delivery device over the application zone. 47. A method according to any of claims 39-46 further comprising applying a cover to the application zone after application of the active compound.
